scripts.dev: concurrently -i -c "magenta,cyan,green" -n "FRONT,BACK,PYTHON" "npm start --prefix FrontEnd" "npm start --prefix BackEnd" "cd PythonApi && python darwin.py"
scripts.dev:local: concurrently -i -c "magenta,cyan,green" -n "FRONT,BACK,PYTHON" "npm start --prefix FrontEnd" "npm run start:local --prefix BackEnd" "cd PythonApi && python darwin.py"
